title: HEC Trading Competition
summary: QUARCC were semi-finalists at HEC Trading Competition with Carter Cameron, Hubert Lefebvre, and Anas Maaiti
detail:
QUARCC were semi-finalists at HEC Trading Competition building an equity trading strategy with 14 sharpe ratio & 55 sortino ratio in the week long competition.(Carter Cameron, Hubert Lefebvre, and Anas Maaiti) 

 .
